title: Vegan Vietnamese Beef Noodle Soup
description: A plant-based take on the popular Vietnamese dish. Rich, savory, and comforting.
instructions: Cook the Rieu broth and set aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a pan and sauté the onion, garlic, and ginger until softened.
Add the 'beef' strips and cook until browned.
Add the soy sauce and maple syrup to the pan and stir to coat the 'beef'.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the Rieu broth to the pan and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
